children.name: Export your designs to HTML code

textData.characters: Export your designs to HTML code
Built with Anima & Figma - Anima converts design to code, automatically

children.name: Features highlights Here are some superpowers you can get when building with Figma + Anima

textData.characters:
Features highlights
Here are some superpowers you can get when building with Figma + Anima

Get a public link: Sync → Share → Public link
Connect a domain: Project page → Settings → Public link
Export HTML/React/Vue code: Plugin → “Get code” tab
Multiple options to publish a live website:
Google maps, Analytics pixels, HubSpot forms, and any code in HTML/JS/CSS.

Create a rectangle & use Anima plugin to add video/GIF/Lottie
These will play on “Preview in Browser”
Use Breakpoints together with Auto-layout, so when opening from mobile or desktop, users will always get to the right view.

children.name: You may also connect a domain directly to Anima (link)

textData.characters: You may also connect a domain directly to Anima (link)

children.name: Click 'Preview' to see a fast preview in HTML

textData.characters: Click 'Preview' to see a fast preview in HTML

children.name: Click ‘Get Code’ to export HTML, or ‘Sync’ to update the live project

textData.characters: Click ‘Get Code’ to export HTML, or ‘Sync’ to update the live project

children.name: Anima converts Figma into code! You can turn this template into HTML and publish a live website in 5 minutes.

textData.characters:
Anima converts Figma into code!
You can turn this template into HTML and publish a live website in 5 minutes.

children.name: It's fully responsive! Adjust the browser width to see it.

textData.characters:
It's fully responsive! 
Adjust the browser width to see it.
